backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that includes blob storage mixin functionality and exposes a simple healthCheck query function.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two SEO-related features (valid sitemap/robots.txt URLs and consistent canonical URLs) to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing short descriptions of each frontend file, summarizing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: SEO-optimized HTML entry point for VERDIER COUVERTURE with canonical URL, Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data, and Google Site Verification all pointing to the production domain verdiercouverture.fr.
frontend/public/google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.h: Google Search Console HTML verification file containing the google-site-verification meta tag and matching body content.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing the Sitemap directive to the production domain https://verdiercouverture.fr/sitemap.xml.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing the single canonical production URL https://verdiercouverture.fr/ with a monthly change frequency and priority of 1.0.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders all landing page sections (Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Testimonials, Contact, Footer) each wrapped in an ErrorBoundary to isolate render failures.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying company strengths, a certified roofer visual with stat counters, and graceful image error fallback handling.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a validated devis form that constructs and opens a mailto link to sv.couverture95@gmail.com, showing a confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, contact details (phone, email, location), service links, navigation links, intervention zones, and a copyright notice for VERDIER COUVERTURE.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, trust badges, and two phone number CTAs plus buttons to scroll to the contact and services sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, two phone CTAs, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu that toggles on scroll state.
frontend/src/components/ServiceAreas.tsx: Displays VERDIER COUVERTURE's geographic coverage with a tag-cloud of ~40 Val-d'Oise cities and a list of service keywords for SEO purposes.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a grid of six service cards (roofing, tiling, zinc work, insulation, repairs, cleaning), each with a lazy-loaded image, description, and feature bullet points.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: React component that renders a grid of six hardcoded customer testimonials with star ratings, author info, and Schema.org Review structured data markup.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useHealthCheck hook that calls the backend actor's healthCheck method via React Query, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm earthy brand palette (terracotta, charcoal, offwhite) plus reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH brand colors, serif/sans font families, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography and container-query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for Verdier Couverture tracking existing features and pending action requests related to fixing 4xx SEO errors (sitemap, canonical URLs, routing, and Google Search Console verification).
